description: Bracket-WRITE on a map is forbidden EVERYWHERE it can occur (§59.7) — including an inline event-handler ${...}. onclick=${@m["DAL"] = 4500} is an ExprNode assignment whose target is a map-typed index; it never becomes a reactive-nested-assign logic node, so it previously escaped the fn-body gate and silently miscompiled (the COW lowering corrupts the map). The inline-handler locus now fires E-MAP-BRACKET-WRITE (error), with the same fix-it naming .insert(k,v). Sibling of bracket-write-pos (the function-body form).
rationale: §59.7 @m[k] = v bracket-write on a map-typed cell is E-MAP-BRACKET-WRITE at any locus it can occur; the inline-handler ExprNode is scanned so read is bracket, write is method.
